'''ân-h-sh''' ('''kanahash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precancel|precancel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precancel|precancel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kanahash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinahash|thinahash]] || [[word:jinahash|jinahash]] || [[word:shinahash|shinahash]] || [[word:kinahash|kinahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunahash|thuthunahash]] || [[word:jujunahash|jujunahash]] || [[word:shushunahash|shushunahash]] || [[word:kukunahash|kukunahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunahash|thunahash]] || [[word:junahash|junahash]] || [[word:shunahash|shunahash]] || [[word:kunahash|kunahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunahash|thunahash]] || [[word:junahash|junahash]] || [[word:shunahash|shunahash]] || [[word:kunahash|kunahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenahash|thenahash]] || [[word:jenahash|jenahash]] || [[word:shenahash|shenahash]] || [[word:kenahash|kenahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonahash|thothonahash]] || [[word:jojonahash|jojonahash]] || [[word:shoshonahash|shoshonahash]] || [[word:kokonahash|kokonahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonahash|thonahash]] || [[word:jonahash|jonahash]] || [[word:shonahash|shonahash]] || [[word:konahash|konahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonahash|thonahash]] || [[word:jonahash|jonahash]] || [[word:shonahash|shonahash]] || [[word:konahash|konahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnahash|thĂŠnahash]] || [[word:jĂŠnahash|jĂŠnahash]] || [[word:shĂŠnahash|shĂŠnahash]] || [[word:kĂŠnahash|kĂŠnahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanahash|thathanahash]] || [[word:jajanahash|jajanahash]] || [[word:shashanahash|shashanahash]] || [[word:kakanahash|kakanahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanahash|thanahash]] || [[word:janahash|janahash]] || [[word:shanahash|shanahash]] || [[word:kanahash|kanahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanahash|thanahash]] || [[word:janahash|janahash]] || [[word:shanahash|shanahash]] || [[word:kanahash|kanahash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanahash|shanahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanahash|goshanahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanahash|gokishanahash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanahashnĂŒ|shanahashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanahashnknĂŒ|goshanahashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanahashnĂŒ|gokishanahashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanahashĂ«|shanahashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanahashnkshĂ«|goshanahashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanahashĂ«|gokishanahashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanahashro|shanahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanahashnkro|goshanahashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanahashro|gokishanahashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanahashmu|shanahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanahashnkmu|goshanahashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanahashmu|gokishanahashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanahasher|shanahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanahashnksher|goshanahashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanahasher|gokishanahasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanahashng|shanahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanahashnkng|goshanahashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanahashng|gokishanahashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanahashya|shanahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanahashnkya|goshanahashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanahashya|gokishanahashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanahashyam|shanahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanahashnkyam|goshanahashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanahashyam|gokishanahashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanahashnĂŒshĂ«|shanahashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanahashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanahashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanahashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanahashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanahashnĂŒro|shanahashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanahashnknĂŒro|goshanahashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanahashnĂŒro|gokishanahashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanahashnĂŒmu|shanahashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanahashnknĂŒmu|goshanahashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanahashnĂŒmu|gokishanahashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanahashĂ«nĂŒ|shanahashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanahashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanahashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanahashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanahashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanahashĂ«ro|shanahashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanahashnkshĂ«ro|goshanahashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanahashĂ«ro|gokishanahashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanahashĂ«mu|shanahashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanahashnkshĂ«mu|goshanahashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanahashĂ«mu|gokishanahashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanahashronĂŒ|shanahashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanahashnkronĂŒ|goshanahashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanahashronĂŒ|gokishanahashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanahashroshĂ«|shanahashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanahashnkroshĂ«|goshanahashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanahashroshĂ«|gokishanahashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanahashromu|shanahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanahashnkromu|goshanahashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanahashromu|gokishanahashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanahashmunĂŒ|shanahashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanahashnkmunĂŒ|goshanahashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanahashmunĂŒ|gokishanahashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanahashmushĂ«|shanahashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanahashnkmushĂ«|goshanahashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanahashmushĂ«|gokishanahashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanahashmuro|shanahashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanahashnkmuro|goshanahashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanahashmuro|gokishanahashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
